tier_rationale: Expanded from a Tier1 operational guide task into a harness automation task after user confirmation. Changes remain outside product runtime, but include scripts/run-generator.mjs and therefore require local harness audit before merge.
request_summary: Document Claude Code CLI operation and add a concrete Generator execution pipeline wrapper that can invoke Claude CLI from task-scoped handoff files.
goal: Provide operator-oriented Korean guides and a reproducible `scripts/run-generator.mjs` wrapper so harness operators can run Generator with fresh Claude CLI execution, artifact capture, and ledger events.

positive: Source from official Claude Code documentation (code.claude.com/docs).
Write in Korean prose with English flag/option names preserved verbatim.
Cover invocation modes, all major flags, subcommands, environment variables, slash commands, headless usage, and practical examples.
Mark items that could not be verified as 확인 불가 instead of guessing.
Save the guide as docs/guides/claude-cli-options-ko.md alongside other operational guides (mcp-setup.md, resend-setup.md, etc.).
Add a Generator wrapper script that validates handoff input, enforces fresh-session Claude CLI flags, captures stdout/stderr/metadata, and appends ledger events.
negative: Do not modify product runtime code (api/, public/, wrangler.toml).
Do not change authority documents (AGENTS.md, SECURITY.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/agents/*, docs/operations/*, docs/workflows/*, docs/schemas/*).
Do not include API keys, OAuth tokens, or any secret values; only reference environment variable names.
Do not invent flags, subcommands, or environment variables that are not documented.

success_criteria: docs/guides/claude-cli-options-ko.md exists with sections for 기본 호출, 주요 플래그, 서브커맨드, 환경 변수, 슬래시 커맨드, Headless 모드, 실전 예시.
scripts/run-generator.mjs exists and supports dry-run validation plus real Claude CLI invocation from a task handoff file.
package.json exposes the wrapper as npm run run:generator.
docs/guides/generator-pipeline-ko.md documents wrapper inputs, outputs, ledger events, and Validator handoff steps.
All flag and environment variable names are written exactly as in the official documentation.
Korean prose is the primary explanation language; English is reserved for identifiers and short example commands.
TASK-20260428-001 ledger has TASK_CREATED and TASK_COMPLETED with artifact_refs to the spec, session log, and guide file.
SESSION-20260428-001.md exists and references the inline reports given to the user.
CURRENT_STATE.md `마지막 갱신` line and `활성 Task` section reflect the new task.
npm run audit:harness reports no failures attributable to this task.

context.relevant_history: User asked for a comprehensive Korean reference of all Claude Code CLI options to be stored under a new guides/ directory. The request is operator-facing documentation, not product code.
